title: DSL Heavy Duty Braked 50mm Swivel Castor Wheels Trolley – Caster Wheels Set of 4 – Rubbered Castors for Furniture – Upto 200KG + Free Fitting
features: ⭐Wheels for Furniture - Heavy Duty castor wheels to easily move heavy furniture with loading capacity of 50KG (each castor). Ideal for office and household furniture. Use our furniture moving wheels to move heavy objects to avoid back pain or muscle strain

⭐Versatile Usage - These castor wheels can also be used as trolley wheels, wheels for furniture, office chair wheels, any appliance wheels, suitcase wheels, garden wooden planter, dolly trolley or tool trolley, etc

⭐Safe for All Floors Purpose- DSL castor wheels are made from premium polyurethane (PU) materials, combined with ball bearings using in all joints which ensure their flexibility and durability. Their smoothness and silentness also allows no marks on the floor

⭐Easy Installation - The pack comes with caster wheels set of 4 & free screw fitting. They will meet your immediate needs either at home, office or studios, warehouse, garage, workshop, yard, patio, garden, schools, shops and more - indoors or outdoors
⭐Wheels Specification - Wheel Diameter: 50mm 2", Overall Height: 71mm 2.8" Mounting Plate: 50mm x 50mm 2" x 2" Free 16PCs 6mm x 27mm Screw fitting
